I'd like to see this game get good reviews but for right now i don't have high hopes
This game has potential if you update, more players will join if you just update the game please.
don't buy it it's just bots
Nobody plays the game is terrible
I am tired of playing with just bots.

The best

This game used to be good but lost its players so you have to play with ai
No one online and so boring

This is so good however in rating it 4 stars because I feel like it’s cooler with out the peaceful version however it’s still very funny and a great game to play

I like Russian roulette very much and this game is perfect for me. The game would be very fun to play with friends, but if you can't play with anyone, there's an offline mode where you can play with bots! In my opinion, I guess it's pretty worth it to buy this game.
No one is playing second half of my friends can’t join me do not buy

reviews.review_title: Great game doesn’t deserve the low stars
reviews.review_description: Game is extremely fun and if u set up a public server people join. There are a few bugs but it’s a very funny and silly game to play with friends, strangers or on your own. 5 stars!
When I get on to play I usually see zero to 8 players and it's annoying to have to wait for a server to open up.Other than that, it's a fun game when you play with friends.

This game is abandonware. It has MANY game-breaking bugs, and the developers jumped ship immediately after this game to make a tennis game. They never came back. This game MAYBE has 10 people maximum on a good day, and that's with crossplay. All because the game literally cannot play for more than 20 minutes before spacetime begins crumbling, everything is frozen, and there's 7 duplicates of Joe for some reason. If you have one dumb kid that won't leave the only server, the ENTIRE game stays broken, no more multiplayer because you'll just keep matching to the broken room. These developers are swindlers. They released a broken game, took money for it, and never fixed one bug in it. They never even made the game functional.

As of writing this review, it's been over a year since the developers even acknowledged this games existence. They're gone. Never getting fixed.
If it had a real physics and an actual gun it would be way more fun and also peaceful edition doesn't make sense because what is peaceful about pointing a gun to your head
Bad because of peaceful
It’s fun the realistic version was better tho
Too many bugs, a glitches too much and why kid friendly
The game itself is good but it won’t let me refund even though I used it less then 2 hours
Can we still not inv friends to this game?

I played a game with a friend, that was fun. But i got the game to do it with 2 friends and it wont work. Definitly a major issue, that should be resolved as quickly as possible. For now ill give a 1 star, but if the issue will be fixed definitely a 5 star.

reviews.review_title: I can't play with all 4 of my friends
reviews.review_description: The game is great but it's quite annoying how there is 4 chairs around a table yet you can only play with 3 people and 1 bot, it would be great if you made it 4 player so I haven't wasted my money on my friend, I feel really bad about it.

reviews.review_title: Great game being tonally snubbed by Meta
reviews.review_description:
Great game, tons of fun with friends. Happy to see that it's on the Meta Store and is on track to receiving updates again.

But Meta forcing these devs to tone down the firearm references is insane! Shooters such as Pavlov and Contractors have real revolvers that you can play russian roulette with, usually depicting more violence than even the original versions of Bullet Roulette. Even SUPERHOT had a gun suicide scene that was allowed on the Quest store, even if it was hastily removed by someone on their dev team for some reason. 

The double standard being displayed here really sucks, the new audio and visual feedback in this Peaceful Edition partially botches the tense atmosphere created by the original versions, but I guess getting onto the main storefront is the only way for FIBRUM to succeed on this platform. 

In terms of actual game feedback, all I ask is that you return the automatic seating calibration that would occur when entering a game like in the original, or add a proper seating calibration mode in the settings or when you first open the game.

Can't wait to see more updates!

EDIT: My feedback was addressed really quickly, thanks guys.

It's amazing how wide a range of emotions this game brings. If you play with npc, you get angry at how difficult and sometimes scary it can be with them. Playing with real people (and especially with friends) is ridiculously funny.
I feel like it would be better with a real gun and stuff and if meta lets you add a gore option like in the OG game
Add blood if meta lets you and peace full edition is not good

reviews.review_title: 5 star game once you get the hang
reviews.review_description:
Great wee game... Loads of laughs. Would be great to see it expanded on though. 😃
Would be great to have the option to play the adult version also. A scoring system and a leader board would also drive more players to the game.

reviews.review_title: Its a great game but has issues
reviews.review_description: I was gifted this by my good friend and my two buddies and I tried to play but we could not play with 3 people. This is a very large problem and needs to be resolved. Peaceful edition also makes no sense, its a game about russian roulette its not exactly peaceful.
Add a menu with food and drinks that you could order stuff off of
The game is very fun there are not that much people playing but I still love it.
I wish there were some updates to fix some of these bugs but overall this game is fun to play with friends
